prompt:
Using the provided reference image as the layout and webpage screenshot template, replace the existing KFC case with a new social-media prompt-library entry for a colorful cafe brand campaign. Keep the same cropped mobile screenshot composition, white page background, blue linked case title styling, centered bordered “Output” box, and “Prompt:” label below.

Update the visible page text to exactly 4 main text elements: 1 cropped line at the very top reading “The overall mood should feel se”, 1 case title reading “Case 172: Berry Splash Cafe Campaign (by @iamaiistudio)” with the campaign title and handle in blue, 1 centered label reading “Output”, and 1 lower label reading “Prompt:”.

Inside the Output frame, create a vertical lifestyle advertising poster for Berry Loud: a vibrant cafe interior with teal-green and pink walls, hanging plants, warm pendant lights, and a wooden table. Feature exactly 1 woman seated at the table, holding a spoonful of berry smoothie bowl, wearing a bright hot-pink blazer. Add exactly 2 product items on the table: 1 berry smoothie/acai bowl topped with granola, berries, banana slices, and seeds, and 1 cylindrical product jar with a teal-and-magenta label. Include exactly 3 visible poster text areas: a large cream retro bubble-letter logo “BERRY LOUD” at the top left, the product jar label “BERRY LOUD” with smaller text “ORIGINAL AÇAÍ BLEND” and “PREMIUM ACAI”, and a pink neon wall sign on the right reading “GOOD VIBES”.

Style the poster as a polished commercial cafe campaign shot: wide-angle lifestyle photography, bright saturated colors, soft natural depth of field, warm cozy lighting, trendy wellness-brand aesthetic, realistic product packaging, and clean readable typography. Preserve the screenshot framing and do not add extra UI elements, watermarks, or unrelated text.
